message:
feat(api): add shared FleetControlManager with OnceLock singleton

Add thread-safe global FleetControlManager using OnceLock<Mutex<...>>
for managing fleet quarantine state across API handlers:

- SHARED_FLEET_CONTROL_MANAGER: lazily-initialized singleton
- shared_fleet_control_manager(): accessor returning &'static Mutex
- lock_shared_fleet_control_manager(): locks with trace-aware ApiError
  on poisoned mutex
- reset_shared_fleet_control_manager_for_tests(): test helper that
  recovers from poisoned state for test isolation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
